commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Samuel lay until the morning, and opened the doors of the house of the LORD. And Samuel feared to tell Eli the vision. Hebrew and Septuagint, "laid himself down to sleep. "For how could he take any rest after such terrible threats. (Calmet) particularly as light was beginning to appear, when he was called by God, ver. Some walls had probably been built, to enclose the curtains of the tabernacle. A priest would have been employed to open the sanctuary.
